历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 4428→29255→9462→6669→7511. In 2022, there was an abnormal sharp decline followed by a rapid recovery. In the recent 3 years, it has stabilized in the range of 6700-9500. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 7511. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment for Science/Physics Category was 51→55→62→64→85, showing continuous expansion. In 2025, it expanded to 85 students, a relatively large increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the fluctuation trend of historical rankings and the background of continuous enrollment expansion, the preliminary estimate for the minimum ranking of Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 7700, with a range of 7300-8100. This prediction is an incomplete estimate and requires supplementary data such as enrollment plans, total number of examinees, reputation heat, etc., for recalculation.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 720→883→886→1038→2608. In 2025, the ranking dropped to 2608 due to the Radio and Television Directing major, while the minimum ranking for regular major groups was about 936. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment for liberal arts/history category was 33→29→30→27→19, continuously decreasing, and in 2025 it was reduced to 19 students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous reduction in enrollment plans and the impact of the Radio and Television Directing major lowering the ranking in 2025, it is preliminarily estimated that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will be approximately 2700, with a range of 2500-2900. This prediction is incomplete and requires supplementation with data such as enrollment plans, total number of examinees, reputation popularity, etc., for recalculation.
